---
title: "Chondrocyte comparison analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
```

```{r load_libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(circular)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggrepel)
library(forcats)
```

```{r load_data}
# ── Read circadian tables ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
osmo_data      <- read.csv("results/tables/osmo_circ.csv")
dex_data       <- read.csv("results/tables/dex_circ.csv")
hs_data        <- read.csv("results/tables/hs_circ.csv")
cartilage_data <- read.csv("results/tables/wt_cartilage_circ.csv")

# Standardise cartilage column names to match chondrocyte datasets
cartilage_data <- cartilage_data %>%
  dplyr::rename(Row.names = CycID)

# ── Filter to rhythmic genes ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
osmo_trimmed      <- osmo_data      %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)
dex_trimmed       <- dex_data       %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)
hs_trimmed        <- hs_data        %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)
cartilage_trimmed <- cartilage_data %>% filter(BH.Q < 0.05)

cat("Rhythmic genes (BH.Q < 0.05):\n")
cat("  Osmo:      ", nrow(osmo_trimmed), "\n")
cat("  Dex:       ", nrow(dex_trimmed), "\n")
cat("  HS:        ", nrow(hs_trimmed), "\n")
cat("  Cartilage: ", nrow(cartilage_trimmed), "\n")

# ── Load RDS time-series data for expression plots ───────────────────────────
hs_plot        <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/hs/hs_data.rds")
osmo_plot      <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/osmo/osmo_data.rds")
dex_plot       <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/dex/dex_data.rds")
cartilage_plot <- readRDS("results/shiny_data/mouse/cartilage_circ/cartilage_wt_data.rds")

dataset_list <- list(
  HS        = hs_plot,
  Osmo      = osmo_plot,
  Dex       = dex_plot,
  cartilage = cartilage_plot
)

# ── Output directory ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dir.create("results/publication_figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r helper_functions}
# ── Helper: multi-dataset expression time-series plot ───────────────────────
multi_dataset_plot <- function(data_list, gene, show_line = TRUE, legend = TRUE) {
  filtered_list <- lapply(names(data_list), function(dataset_name) {
    data_list[[dataset_name]] %>%
      filter(Gene == gene) %>%
      mutate(dataset = dataset_name)
  })
  combined_data <- bind_rows(filtered_list)
  if (nrow(combined_data) == 0) {
    cat("Gene not found in any dataset:", gene, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  p <- ggplot(combined_data, aes(x = as.numeric(time_point), y = mean, color = dataset)) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title   = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = if (legend) "bottom" else "none",
      legend.title = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(x = "Circadian Time", y = "Expression", title = gene) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 6,  linetype = "dashed", color = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 12, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sd, ymax = mean + sd), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.7)
  if (show_line) p <- p + geom_line(linewidth = 0.75)
  time_breaks <- sort(unique(as.numeric(combined_data$time_point)))
  n_breaks    <- length(time_breaks)
  ct_values   <- seq(4, by = 4, length.out = n_breaks)
  ct_labels   <- ifelse(seq_len(n_breaks) %% 2 == 1, ct_values, "")
  p + scale_x_continuous(breaks = time_breaks, labels = ct_labels)
}

plot_multiple_genes <- function(data_list, genes, show_line = TRUE) {
  plots <- lapply(genes, function(gene) multi_dataset_plot(data_list, gene, show_line))
  wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 3)
}

# ── Helper: phase distribution rose plot ────────────────────────────────────
create_rose_plot <- function(data, dataset_name) {
  dataset_data <- data %>% filter(dataset == dataset_name)
  all_phases   <- data.frame(phase_circular = c(0, 4, 8, 12, 16, 20))
  dataset_data <- all_phases %>%
    left_join(dataset_data, by = "phase_circular") %>%
    mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
           phase_plot = phase_circular + 2)
  ggplot(dataset_data, aes(x = phase_plot, y = count)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7,
             color = "black", width = 3) +
    coord_polar(start = -pi/6, direction = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = c(2, 6, 10, 14, 18, 22),
      labels = c("CT0/24", "CT4", "CT8", "CT12", "CT16", "CT20"),
      limits = c(0, 24)
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title  = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray80", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(title    = dataset_name,
         subtitle = sprintf("n = %d rhythmic genes", sum(dataset_data$count)),
         x = NULL, y = "Number of Genes")
}

# ── Helper: pairwise overlap with pair-specific universe ─────────────────────
hypergeometric_test_pairwise_universe <- function(list1, list2, universe) {
  universe      <- unique(universe)
  original_size1 <- length(unique(list1))
  original_size2 <- length(unique(list2))
  list1 <- intersect(unique(list1), universe)
  list2 <- intersect(unique(list2), universe)
  overlap      <- length(intersect(list1, list2))
  size1        <- length(list1)
  size2        <- length(list2)
  genome_size  <- length(universe)
  expected     <- (size1 * size2) / genome_size
  fold_enrichment <- ifelse(expected > 0, overlap / expected, NA_real_)
  jaccard      <- ifelse(length(union(list1, list2)) > 0,
                         overlap / length(union(list1, list2)), NA_real_)
  p_value <- phyper(overlap - 1, size1, genome_size - size1, size2, lower.tail = FALSE)
  list(universe_size = genome_size,
       original_size1 = original_size1, original_size2 = original_size2,
       overlap = overlap, size1 = size1, size2 = size2,
       expected = expected, fold_enrichment = fold_enrichment,
       jaccard = jaccard, p_value = p_value)
}

# ── Helper: clock-relative phase computation ─────────────────────────────────
get_phase_by_symbol <- function(data, gene_symbol,
                                symbol_col = "mgi_symbol", phase_col = "phase") {
  row <- data %>% filter(!!sym(symbol_col) == gene_symbol)
  if (nrow(row) == 0) return(NA)
  row[[phase_col]][1]
}

compute_clock_relative_phase <- function(data, ref_phase,
                                         symbol_col = "mgi_symbol",
                                         phase_col  = "phase") {
  data %>% mutate(
    clock_relative_phase = (!!sym(phase_col) - ref_phase) %% 24,
    clock_relative_phase = ifelse(clock_relative_phase > 12,
                                  clock_relative_phase - 24,
                                  clock_relative_phase)
  )
}

circ_dist_24 <- function(a, b) {
  d <- abs(a - b) %% 24
  ifelse(d > 12, 24 - d, d)
}

# ── Helper: enrichment term overlap ─────────────────────────────────────────
compare_enrichment_overlap <- function(enrich1, enrich2, name1, name2,
                                       category_filter, universe_size) {
  e1 <- enrich1 %>% filter(category == category_filter)
  e2 <- enrich2 %>% filter(category == category_filter)
  if (nrow(e1) == 0 || nrow(e2) == 0)
    return(list(overlap = 0, size1 = nrow(e1), size2 = nrow(e2),
                overlap_terms = character(0), p_value = 1, fold_enrichment = 0,
                jaccard = 0, expected = 0, dataset1 = name1, dataset2 = name2,
                category = category_filter))
  terms1         <- e1$description
  terms2         <- e2$description
  overlap_terms  <- intersect(terms1, terms2)
  overlap_count  <- length(overlap_terms)
  size1          <- length(terms1)
  size2          <- length(terms2)
  expected       <- (size1 * size2) / universe_size
  fold_enrichment <- ifelse(expected > 0, overlap_count / expected, 0)
  p_value        <- phyper(overlap_count - 1, size1, universe_size - size1,
                           size2, lower.tail = FALSE)
  list(dataset1 = name1, dataset2 = name2, category = category_filter,
       size1 = size1, size2 = size2, overlap = overlap_count,
       expected = expected, fold_enrichment = fold_enrichment,
       jaccard = overlap_count / length(union(terms1, terms2)),
       p_value = p_value, overlap_terms = overlap_terms)
}

# ── Helper: enrichment tile heatmap ─────────────────────────────────────────
make_tile_heatmap <- function(data, cat) {
  all_terms    <- data %>% filter(category_label == cat) %>% pull(description) %>% unique()
  all_datasets <- c("Osmo", "Dex", "HS", "Cartilage")
  full_grid    <- expand.grid(description = all_terms, dataset = all_datasets,
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  d <- data %>%
    filter(category_label == cat) %>%
    dplyr::select(description, dataset, neg_log10_fdr, number_of_genes)
  merged <- full_grid %>%
    left_join(d, by = c("description", "dataset")) %>%
    mutate(dataset     = factor(dataset, levels = all_datasets),
           description = fct_reorder(description, neg_log10_fdr,
                                     .fun = function(x) max(x, na.rm = TRUE)))
  ggplot(merged, aes(x = dataset, y = description, fill = neg_log10_fdr)) +
    geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(!is.na(number_of_genes),
                                 as.character(number_of_genes), "")),
              size = 3, colour = "white", fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "#fdcc8a", high = "#b30000", na.value = "grey90",
                        name = "-log10(FDR)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
          plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          panel.grid  = element_blank()) +
    labs(title = cat, x = NULL, y = NULL,
         caption = "Number in cell = gene count; grey = not significant")
}

# ── Helper: enrichment bar chart ─────────────────────────────────────────────
make_bar_chart <- function(data, cat, dataset_colors) {
  d <- data %>%
    filter(category_label == cat) %>%
    mutate(description = fct_reorder(description, neg_log10_fdr))
  ggplot(d, aes(x = neg_log10_fdr, y = description, fill = dataset)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.65, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed",
               colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = dataset_colors, name = "Dataset") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
          plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
          legend.position = "right") +
    labs(title = cat, x = "-log10(FDR)", y = NULL,
         caption = "Dashed line = FDR 0.05 | Top 5 terms per dataset")
}
```

```{r Fig1C_overlapping_genes}
# ── 3-way stress overlap (by Ensembl ID) ────────────────────────────────────
stress_overlap_genes <- Reduce(intersect, list(
  osmo_trimmed$Row.names,
  dex_trimmed$Row.names,
  hs_trimmed$Row.names
))

cat("3-way stress overlap: ", length(stress_overlap_genes), " genes\n")

# Extract those genes from cartilage (needed for CRP section later)
cartilage_overlapping <- cartilage_trimmed %>%
  filter(Row.names %in% stress_overlap_genes)

# ── Priority-ordered gene list for plotting ──────────────────────────────────
priority_genes <- c("Bmal1", "Npas2", "Cry1", "Nr1d1", "Per1", "Per2", "Per3", "Dbp", "Tef")
overlap_genes  <- unique(na.omit(cartilage_overlapping$mgi_symbol))
ordered_genes  <- c(
  priority_genes[priority_genes %in% overlap_genes],
  sort(setdiff(overlap_genes, priority_genes))
)

p_overlapping <- plot_multiple_genes(dataset_list, ordered_genes, show_line = TRUE)
p_overlapping

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1C_overlapping_genes.pdf",
       plot = p_overlapping, width = 9, height = 13)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1C_overlapping_genes.png",
       plot = p_overlapping, width = 9, height = 13)
```

```{r Fig2A_rose_plots_combined}
# ── Phase distribution data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
phase_distribution_data <- bind_rows(
  osmo_trimmed      %>% mutate(dataset = "Osmotic Stress") %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset),
  dex_trimmed       %>% mutate(dataset = "Dexamethasone")  %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset),
  hs_trimmed        %>% mutate(dataset = "Heat Shock")     %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset),
  cartilage_trimmed %>% mutate(dataset = "Cartilage")      %>% dplyr::select(phase, dataset)
) %>%
  mutate(phase_circular = ifelse(phase == 24, 0, phase))

phase_counts <- phase_distribution_data %>%
  group_by(dataset, phase_circular) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

p_rose_osmo      <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Osmotic Stress")
p_rose_dex       <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Dexamethasone")
p_rose_hs        <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Heat Shock")
p_rose_cartilage <- create_rose_plot(phase_counts, "Cartilage")

p_rose_combined <- (p_rose_osmo | p_rose_dex) / (p_rose_hs | p_rose_cartilage)
p_rose_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2A_rose_plots_combined.pdf",
       plot = p_rose_combined, width = 10, height = 10)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2A_rose_plots_combined.png",
       plot = p_rose_combined, width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 600)
```

```{r pairwise_overlap_supp_table2}
# ── Full tested gene sets (universe per pair = intersection) ─────────────────
gene_universes <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_data$Row.names,
  Dex       = dex_data$Row.names,
  HS        = hs_data$Row.names,
  Cartilage = cartilage_data$Row.names
)

gene_lists <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_trimmed$Row.names,
  Dex       = dex_trimmed$Row.names,
  HS        = hs_trimmed$Row.names,
  Cartilage = cartilage_trimmed$Row.names
)

dataset_names <- names(gene_lists)
n_datasets    <- length(dataset_names)

run_pairwise_overlap <- function(gene_lists, gene_universes, bhq_label) {
  results <- data.frame()
  ds_names <- names(gene_lists)
  for (i in 1:(length(ds_names) - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):length(ds_names)) {
      name1        <- ds_names[i]
      name2        <- ds_names[j]
      pair_universe <- intersect(gene_universes[[name1]], gene_universes[[name2]])
      res          <- hypergeometric_test_pairwise_universe(
        gene_lists[[name1]], gene_lists[[name2]], pair_universe)
      results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
        Dataset1        = name1,
        Dataset2        = name2,
        Universe_Size   = res$universe_size,
        Size1           = res$size1,
        Size2           = res$size2,
        Overlap         = res$overlap,
        Expected        = round(res$expected, 2),
        Fold_Enrichment = round(res$fold_enrichment, 2),
        Jaccard_Index   = round(res$jaccard, 3),
        P_value         = format(res$p_value, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
        Significant     = ifelse(res$p_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
        BH.Q.cut.off    = bhq_label,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
  results
}

results_05 <- run_pairwise_overlap(gene_lists, gene_universes, "0.05")

gene_lists_01 <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_data      %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names),
  Dex       = dex_data       %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names),
  HS        = hs_data        %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names),
  Cartilage = cartilage_data %>% filter(BH.Q <= 0.01) %>% pull(Row.names)
)
results_01 <- run_pairwise_overlap(gene_lists_01, gene_universes, "0.01")

pairwise_universe_results <- results_05  # used downstream

supp2 <- bind_rows(results_05, results_01) %>%
  dplyr::rename(`BH.Q cut-off` = BH.Q.cut.off)

write.csv(supp2,
          "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_2.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
cat("Supplementary_table_2.csv saved.\n")
print(results_05)
```

```{r Fig1D_jaccard_4way_comparison}
# ── Build symmetric 4x4 Jaccard matrix ──────────────────────────────────────
jaccard_mat <- matrix(1, nrow = n_datasets, ncol = n_datasets,
                      dimnames = list(dataset_names, dataset_names))

for (k in seq_len(nrow(pairwise_universe_results))) {
  n1 <- as.character(pairwise_universe_results$Dataset1[k])
  n2 <- as.character(pairwise_universe_results$Dataset2[k])
  j  <- as.numeric(pairwise_universe_results$Jaccard_Index[k])
  jaccard_mat[n1, n2] <- j
  jaccard_mat[n2, n1] <- j
}

p_jaccard <- pheatmap(
  jaccard_mat,
  display_numbers  = TRUE,
  number_format    = "%.3f",
  cluster_rows     = FALSE,
  cluster_cols     = FALSE,
  color            = colorRampPalette(c("white", "orange", "red"))(100),
  main             = "Jaccard similarity of rhythmic gene sets (BH.Q < 0.05)\nPair-specific universe",
  fontsize_number  = 12,
  fontsize         = 12
)

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1D_jaccard_4way_comparison.pdf",
       plot = p_jaccard, width = 6, height = 5)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig1D_jaccard_4way_comparison.png",
       plot = p_jaccard, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r crp_setup}
# ── Core clock gene set ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
core_clock_genes <- c("Bmal1", "Clock", "Per1", "Per2", "Per3",
                      "Cry1", "Cry2", "Nr1d1", "Nr1d2", "Dbp", "Tef", "Npas2")

datasets <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_trimmed,
  Dex       = dex_trimmed,
  HS        = hs_trimmed,
  Cartilage = cartilage_trimmed
)

# ── Supplementary Table 3: core clock gene absolute phases ───────────────────
clock_phases <- data.frame()
for (ds_name in names(datasets)) {
  ds <- datasets[[ds_name]]
  for (gene in core_clock_genes) {
    ph <- get_phase_by_symbol(ds, gene)
    clock_phases <- rbind(clock_phases, data.frame(
      dataset = ds_name, gene = gene, phase = ph,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

clock_wide <- clock_phases %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = dataset, values_from = phase)

cat("=== CORE CLOCK GENE PHASES ===\n")
print(clock_wide)

write.csv(clock_wide,
          "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_3.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

# ── Compute clock-relative phases (CRP) for all datasets ────────────────────
ref_gene   <- "Bmal1"
ref_phases <- clock_phases %>%
  filter(gene == ref_gene) %>%
  dplyr::select(dataset, ref_phase = phase)

cat("\n=== Bmal1 reference phases ===\n")
print(ref_phases)

for (ds_name in names(datasets)) {
  ref_ph <- ref_phases$ref_phase[ref_phases$dataset == ds_name]
  if (length(ref_ph) == 0 || is.na(ref_ph)) {
    warning(ref_gene, " not found in ", ds_name, " – skipping CRP computation")
    next
  }
  datasets[[ds_name]] <- compute_clock_relative_phase(datasets[[ds_name]], ref_ph)
}

# ── Build CRP data for 3-way stress overlap genes ────────────────────────────
stress_overlap_genes_symbols <- datasets[["Osmo"]] %>%
  filter(Row.names %in% stress_overlap_genes) %>%
  pull(mgi_symbol) %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  unique()

cat(sprintf("\nAnalysing %d genes common to all 3 stress datasets\n",
            length(stress_overlap_genes_symbols)))

stress_ds_names <- c("Osmo", "Dex", "HS")
crp_data <- data.frame()

for (ds_name in stress_ds_names) {
  ds <- datasets[[ds_name]]
  for (gene_sym in stress_overlap_genes_symbols) {
    row <- ds %>% filter(mgi_symbol == gene_sym)
    if (nrow(row) > 0 && !is.na(row$clock_relative_phase[1])) {
      crp_data <- rbind(crp_data, data.frame(
        gene                 = gene_sym,
        dataset              = ds_name,
        absolute_phase       = row$phase[1],
        clock_relative_phase = row$clock_relative_phase[1],
        stringsAsFactors     = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# ── CRP consistency ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
consistency_threshold <- 0.75

crp_consistency <- crp_data %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(
    n_datasets  = n(),
    mean_crp    = mean(clock_relative_phase),
    sd_crp      = sd(clock_relative_phase),
    range_crp   = max(clock_relative_phase) - min(clock_relative_phase),
    circ_sd_crp = {
      vals <- circular(clock_relative_phase, units = "hours", template = "none")
      rho  <- min(rho.circular(vals), 1.0)
      as.numeric(sqrt(-2 * log(rho)))
    },
    phases     = paste(sprintf("%s:%s",   dataset, absolute_phase),       collapse = ", "),
    crp_values = paste(sprintf("%s:%.1f", dataset, clock_relative_phase), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_datasets >= 2) %>%
  arrange(circ_sd_crp) %>%
  mutate(
    classification = ifelse(circ_sd_crp <= consistency_threshold,
                            "Clock-controlled", "Variable"),
    is_core_clock  = gene %in% core_clock_genes
  )

cat(sprintf("\nClock-controlled: %d  |  Variable: %d\n",
            sum(crp_consistency$classification == "Clock-controlled"),
            sum(crp_consistency$classification == "Variable")))

# ── Supplementary Table 1 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
write.csv(crp_consistency,
          "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_1.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
cat("Supplementary_table_1.csv saved.\n")
```

```{r Fig2E_clock_relative_phase_heatmap}
consistent_genes <- crp_consistency %>%
  filter(classification == "Clock-controlled") %>%
  arrange(mean_crp) %>%
  pull(gene)

if (length(consistent_genes) > 0) {
  heatmap_data <- crp_data %>%
    filter(gene %in% consistent_genes) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, dataset, clock_relative_phase) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = dataset, values_from = clock_relative_phase) %>%
    column_to_rownames("gene")

  gene_order   <- crp_consistency %>%
    filter(gene %in% consistent_genes) %>%
    arrange(mean_crp) %>%
    pull(gene)
  heatmap_data <- heatmap_data[gene_order, , drop = FALSE]
  heatmap_mat  <- as.matrix(heatmap_data)

  p_crp_heatmap <- pheatmap(
    heatmap_mat,
    cluster_rows     = FALSE,
    cluster_cols     = FALSE,
    color            = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    breaks           = seq(-12, 12, length.out = 101),
    main             = sprintf(
      "Clock-relative phases: consistent genes (n=%d)\nHours from Bmal1 peak",
      length(consistent_genes)),
    fontsize_row     = ifelse(length(consistent_genes) > 40, 6, 8),
    show_rownames    = length(consistent_genes) <= 60,
    fontsize         = 10
  )

  fig_h <- max(4, length(consistent_genes) * 0.15 + 2)
  ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2E_clock_relative_phase_heatmap.pdf",
         plot = p_crp_heatmap, width = 6, height = fig_h)
  ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2E_clock_relative_phase_heatmap.png",
         plot = p_crp_heatmap, width = 6, height = fig_h, dpi = 300)
}
```

```{r crp_pairwise}
circ_dist_threshold <- 4  # hours

ds_pairs <- list(
  c("Osmo", "Dex"),
  c("Osmo", "HS"),
  c("Osmo", "Cartilage"),
  c("Dex",  "HS"),
  c("Dex",  "Cartilage"),
  c("HS",   "Cartilage")
)

pairwise_crp_results <- list()
pairwise_summary     <- data.frame()

for (pair in ds_pairs) {
  d1    <- pair[1];  d2 <- pair[2]
  label <- paste(d1, d2, sep = "_vs_")

  shared_ids <- intersect(datasets[[d1]]$Row.names, datasets[[d2]]$Row.names)

  df1 <- datasets[[d1]] %>%
    filter(Row.names %in% shared_ids) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene = mgi_symbol, id = Row.names,
                  crp_1 = clock_relative_phase, abs_1 = phase) %>%
    mutate(dataset1 = d1)

  df2 <- datasets[[d2]] %>%
    filter(Row.names %in% shared_ids) %>%
    dplyr::select(id = Row.names, crp_2 = clock_relative_phase, abs_2 = phase) %>%
    mutate(dataset2 = d2)

  merged <- inner_join(df1, df2, by = "id") %>%
    filter(!is.na(crp_1), !is.na(crp_2)) %>%
    mutate(circ_dist      = circ_dist_24(crp_1, crp_2),
           classification = ifelse(circ_dist <= circ_dist_threshold,
                                   "Clock-controlled", "Variable"))

  n_total      <- nrow(merged)
  n_controlled <- sum(merged$classification == "Clock-controlled")
  pct          <- 100 * n_controlled / n_total

  pairwise_crp_results[[label]] <- merged
  pairwise_summary <- rbind(pairwise_summary, data.frame(
    pair                 = label,
    dataset1             = d1,
    dataset2             = d2,
    n_shared_genes       = n_total,
    n_clock_controlled   = n_controlled,
    pct_clock_controlled = round(pct, 1),
    threshold_h          = circ_dist_threshold,
    stringsAsFactors     = FALSE
  ))
}

# ── Permutation tests ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
set.seed(42)
n_perm     <- 1000
stat_results <- data.frame()

for (pair in ds_pairs) {
  d1    <- pair[1];  d2 <- pair[2]
  label <- paste(d1, d2, sep = "_vs_")
  df    <- pairwise_crp_results[[label]]
  n_genes  <- nrow(df)
  obs_pct  <- 100 * sum(df$classification == "Clock-controlled") / n_genes

  perm_pcts <- replicate(n_perm, {
    crp_2_perm <- sample(df$crp_2)
    dists      <- circ_dist_24(df$crp_1, crp_2_perm)
    100 * sum(dists <= circ_dist_threshold) / n_genes
  })

  perm_p         <- mean(perm_pcts >= obs_pct)
  perm_null_mean <- mean(perm_pcts)
  perm_null_sd   <- sd(perm_pcts)

  stat_results <- rbind(stat_results, data.frame(
    pair                 = label,
    obs_pct_cc           = round(obs_pct, 1),
    perm_null_mean_pct   = round(perm_null_mean, 1),
    perm_null_sd_pct     = round(perm_null_sd, 2),
    perm_p_value         = perm_p,
    stringsAsFactors     = FALSE
  ))
}

stat_results <- stat_results %>%
  mutate(perm_p_BH = p.adjust(perm_p_value, method = "BH"))

pairwise_summary <- pairwise_summary %>%
  left_join(stat_results %>%
    dplyr::select(pair, perm_null_mean_pct, perm_null_sd_pct,
                  perm_p_value, perm_p_BH),
    by = "pair")

write.csv(pairwise_summary,
          "results/publication_figures/crp_pairwise_summary.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

# ── Figure: Fig2C_crp_pairwise_proportion ─────────────────────────────────────
p_bar <- ggplot(pairwise_summary, aes(x = pair)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = pct_clock_controlled, fill = pair),
           colour = "black", width = 0.6) +
  geom_col(aes(y = perm_null_mean_pct),
           fill = "grey30", alpha = 0.5, width = 0.25) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = perm_null_mean_pct - 2 * perm_null_sd_pct,
                    ymax = perm_null_mean_pct + 2 * perm_null_sd_pct),
                width = 0.12, colour = "grey10", linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(y    = pct_clock_controlled,
                label = sprintf(
                  "%d/%d (%.0f%%)\np=%s",
                  n_clock_controlled, n_shared_genes, pct_clock_controlled,
                  dplyr::case_when(
                    perm_p_BH == 0   ~ "<0.001",
                    perm_p_BH >= 0.1 ~ sprintf("%.2f",  perm_p_BH),
                    TRUE             ~ sprintf("%.3f", perm_p_BH)
                  ))),
            vjust = -0.3, size = 3, lineheight = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2", guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.18))) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    title    = "Proportion of pairwise-overlap genes with consistent clock-relative phase",
    subtitle = sprintf(
      "Threshold: circular distance \u2264 %gh from Bmal1  |  dark bar = permutation null \u00b1 2 SD",
      circ_dist_threshold),
    x = NULL, y = "% clock-controlled"
  ) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, angle = 30, hjust = 1))

p_bar
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2C_crp_pairwise_proportion.pdf",
       plot = p_bar, width = 5, height = 5)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2C_crp_pairwise_proportion.png",
       plot = p_bar, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

# ── Figure: Fig2B_pairwise_CRP_comparison ───────────────────────────────────────────
scatter_plots <- list()

for (pair in ds_pairs) {
  d1    <- pair[1];  d2 <- pair[2]
  label <- paste(d1, d2, sep = "_vs_")
  df    <- pairwise_crp_results[[label]]

  n_total      <- nrow(df)
  n_controlled <- sum(df$classification == "Clock-controlled")

  df_counts <- df %>%
    group_by(crp_1, crp_2, classification) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

  p <- ggplot(df_counts,
              aes(x = crp_1, y = crp_2, colour = classification, size = n)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1,
                linetype = "dashed", colour = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_abline(intercept =  circ_dist_threshold, slope = 1,
                linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40") +
    geom_abline(intercept = -circ_dist_threshold, slope = 1,
                linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("Clock-controlled" = "#4C9BE8",
                                   "Variable"         = "#E87B4C")) +
    scale_size_area(name = "Gene Count", max_size = 15, breaks = c(1, 3, 5, 10)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-12, 12, by = 4)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-12, 12, by = 4)) +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1, xlim = c(-13, 13), ylim = c(-13, 13)) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "right",
          plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.title    = element_text(size = 12),
          axis.text     = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.text   = element_text(size = 12),
          legend.title  = element_text(size = 12)) +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4)),
           size   = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 0.8))) +
    labs(title    = sprintf("%s vs %s", d1, d2),
         subtitle = sprintf("n = %d genes | clock-controlled: %d (%.1f%%)",
                            n_total, n_controlled, 100 * n_controlled / n_total),
         x = sprintf("%s CRP (h from Bmal1)", d1),
         y = sprintf("%s CRP (h from Bmal1)", d2),
         colour = NULL)
  scatter_plots[[label]] <- p
}

p_scatter_combined <- wrap_plots(scatter_plots, ncol = 3)
p_scatter_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2B_pairwise_CRP_comparison.pdf",
       plot = p_scatter_combined, width = 17, height = 11)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig2B_pairwise_CRP_comparison.png",
       plot = p_scatter_combined, width = 17, height = 11, dpi = 300)
```

```{r enrichment_supp_table4}
# ── Load pre-computed enrichment CSVs ────────────────────────────────────────
osmo_enrichment      <- read.csv("results/tables/osmo_enrichment.csv")
dex_enrichment       <- read.csv("results/tables/dex_enrichment.csv")
hs_enrichment        <- read.csv("results/tables/hs_enrichment.csv")
cartilage_enrichment <- read.csv("results/tables/cartilage_enrichment.csv")

enrichment_list <- list(
  Osmo      = osmo_enrichment,
  Dex       = dex_enrichment,
  HS        = hs_enrichment,
  Cartilage = cartilage_enrichment
)

categories      <- c("KEGG", "Process", "RCTM", "WikiPathways")
category_names  <- c("KEGG Pathways", "GO Biological Process", "Reactome", "WikiPathways")

# ── Pairwise enrichment term overlaps ────────────────────────────────────────
enrichment_overlap_results <- data.frame()

for (cat_idx in seq_along(categories)) {
  cat_code <- categories[cat_idx]
  cat_name <- category_names[cat_idx]

  all_terms_cat <- unique(unlist(lapply(enrichment_list, function(e)
    e %>% filter(category == cat_code) %>% pull(description))))
  universe_size <- length(all_terms_cat)

  for (i in 1:(n_datasets - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):n_datasets) {
      name1 <- dataset_names[i]
      name2 <- dataset_names[j]
      res   <- compare_enrichment_overlap(
        enrichment_list[[name1]], enrichment_list[[name2]],
        name1, name2, cat_code, universe_size)

      if (res$overlap > 0 || (res$size1 > 0 && res$size2 > 0)) {
        enrichment_overlap_results <- rbind(enrichment_overlap_results, data.frame(
          Category        = cat_name,
          Dataset1        = name1,
          Dataset2        = name2,
          Size1           = res$size1,
          Size2           = res$size2,
          Overlap         = res$overlap,
          Expected        = round(res$expected, 2),
          Fold_Enrichment = round(res$fold_enrichment, 2),
          Jaccard_Index   = round(res$jaccard, 3),
          P_value         = format(res$p_value, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
          Significant     = ifelse(res$p_value < 0.05, "Yes", "No"),
          Percent_of_D1   = round(100 * res$overlap / max(res$size1, 1), 1),
          Percent_of_D2   = round(100 * res$overlap / max(res$size2, 1), 1),
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}

write.csv(enrichment_overlap_results,
          "results/publication_figures/Supplementary_table_4.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
cat("Supplementary_table_4.csv saved.\n")
print(enrichment_overlap_results)
```

```{r enrichment_figures}
# ── Combined enrichment data for figures ─────────────────────────────────────
osmo_enrichment$dataset      <- "Osmo"
dex_enrichment$dataset       <- "Dex"
hs_enrichment$dataset        <- "HS"
cartilage_enrichment$dataset <- "Cartilage"

all_enrich <- bind_rows(
  osmo_enrichment, dex_enrichment, hs_enrichment, cartilage_enrichment
) %>%
  filter(category != "Process") %>%
  mutate(
    category_label = case_when(
      category == "KEGG"         ~ "KEGG Pathways",
      category == "RCTM"         ~ "Reactome",
      category == "WikiPathways" ~ "WikiPathways",
      TRUE                       ~ category
    ),
    neg_log10_fdr = -log10(fdr),
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = c("Osmo", "Dex", "HS", "Cartilage"))
  )

dataset_colors <- c(Osmo = "#4C9BE8", Dex = "#E87B4C",
                    HS   = "#4CE87B", Cartilage = "#C44CE8")

# Terms present in >= 2 datasets
term_dataset_counts <- all_enrich %>%
  group_by(category_label, description) %>%
  summarise(n_datasets = n_distinct(dataset), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_datasets >= 2)

plot_data <- all_enrich %>%
  semi_join(term_dataset_counts, by = c("category_label", "description"))

# ── Figure: enrichment_jaccard_KEGG/RCTM/WikiPathways ───────────────────────
fig_cats <- c("KEGG", "RCTM", "WikiPathways")

for (cat_code in fig_cats) {
  cat_name    <- category_names[match(cat_code, categories)]
  cat_results <- enrichment_overlap_results %>% filter(Category == cat_name)

  jac_mat <- matrix(1, nrow = n_datasets, ncol = n_datasets,
                    dimnames = list(dataset_names, dataset_names))

  for (k in seq_len(nrow(cat_results))) {
    n1 <- as.character(cat_results$Dataset1[k])
    n2 <- as.character(cat_results$Dataset2[k])
    j  <- as.numeric(cat_results$Jaccard_Index[k])
    jac_mat[n1, n2] <- j
    jac_mat[n2, n1] <- j
  }

  p_jac <- pheatmap(jac_mat,
    display_numbers = TRUE, number_format = "%.3f",
    cluster_rows    = FALSE, cluster_cols = FALSE,
    color           = colorRampPalette(c("white", "orange", "red"))(100),
    main            = sprintf("%s\nJaccard Index of enriched terms", cat_name),
    fontsize_number = 20, fontsize = 20)

  ggsave(sprintf("results/publication_figures/Fig3B_enrichment_jaccard_%s.pdf",  cat_code),
         plot = p_jac, width = 7, height = 6)
  ggsave(sprintf("results/publication_figures/Fig3B_enrichment_jaccard_%s.png", cat_code),
         plot = p_jac, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
}

# ── Figure: Supplementary_Figure1 ───────────────────────────────────────────
p_tile_kegg <- make_tile_heatmap(plot_data, "KEGG Pathways")
p_tile_rctm <- make_tile_heatmap(plot_data, "Reactome")
p_tile_wiki <- make_tile_heatmap(plot_data, "WikiPathways")

p_tile_combined <- p_tile_kegg / p_tile_rctm / p_tile_wiki +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "Shared enriched terms across datasets",
    subtitle = "Terms present in \u2265 2 datasets | fill = -log10(FDR) | grey = absent/not significant")

p_tile_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Supplementary_Figure1.pdf",
       plot = p_tile_combined, width = 10, height = 18)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Supplementary_Figure1.png",
       plot = p_tile_combined, width = 8, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# ── Figure: Fig3A_enrichment_barchart ─────────────────────────────────────────────
top5_data <- all_enrich %>%
  group_by(category_label, dataset) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = fdr, n = 5, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(description = fct_reorder(description, neg_log10_fdr))

p_bar_kegg <- make_bar_chart(top5_data, "KEGG Pathways",  dataset_colors)
p_bar_rctm <- make_bar_chart(top5_data, "Reactome",       dataset_colors)
p_bar_wiki <- make_bar_chart(top5_data, "WikiPathways",   dataset_colors)

p_bar_combined <- p_bar_kegg / p_bar_rctm / p_bar_wiki +
  plot_annotation(title    = "Top 5 enriched terms per dataset",
                  subtitle = "Grouped by category")

p_bar_combined

ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig3A_enrichment_barchart.pdf",
       plot = p_bar_combined, width = 7, height = 10)
ggsave("results/publication_figures/Fig3A_enrichment_barchart.png",
       plot = p_bar_combined, width = 7, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```
